descr: Have you two met in a past life? You and your partner are highly compatible. You have similar values, habits, behaviors, and aspirations. In your relationship, you'll understand each other with just a glance. Similar desires and interests - what could be better!

tags.sim:
Shared Values:
 With aligned life principles, your journey together becomes more harmonious

Differences habits:
 Understanding your partner's daily habits can sometimes be challenging

interviews.name: Attachment style
interviews.shortDescription: Discover your desired level of care and attention from your partner, and also assess how much you're capable of giving in return.

interviews.name: Type of temperament
interviews.shortDescription: Choleric, sanguine, melancholic and phlegmatic — how does your temperament affect relationships?
